     The Numbers Business Report

American Assassin (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $36,249,674Details
International Box Office $32,060,466
Worldwide Box Office $68,310,140
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,228,669
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,002,882
Total $9,231,551
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Mitch Rapp is a CIA black ops recruit under the instruction of Cold War veteran Stan Hurley. The pair is enlisted by CIA Deputy Director Irene Kennedy to investigate a wave of apparently random attacks on both military and civilian targets. Together the three discover a pattern in the violence leading them to a joint mission with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative intent on starting a World War in the Middle East.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,846,778 (41.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.44 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$63,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,154 opening theaters/3,154 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $48,332,896

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 15th, 2017 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: September 14th, 2017 (Wide) (Israel)
September 14th, 2017 (Wide) (Middle East Region)
September 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Australia)
September 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Indonesia)
September 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Taiwan)
Video Release: November 28th, 2017 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language throughout, sexual content, drug use and some nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2491 (Cert #51101), 8/30/2017)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Geographical setting: Middle East
Plot point: C.I.A., Revenge, Secret Agent, Terrorism
Social setting: World War III
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: CBS Films, Lorenzo di Bonaventura, Nick Wechsler
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Mitch Rapp is a CIA black ops recruit under the instruction of Cold War veteran Stan Hurley. The pair is enlisted by CIA Deputy Director Irene Kennedy to investigate a wave of apparently random attacks on both military and civilian targets. Together the three discover a pattern in the violence leading them to a joint mission with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative intent on starting a World War in the Middle East.
